blocker: GSE137029 has no explicit patient or donor field or sample-to-person mapping
required_resolution: Require a new authoritative person-mapping asset; otherwise keep GSE137029 blocked for patient-level modeling

blocker: CELLxGENE/HCA has not passed an explicit dataset-selection or access gate
required_resolution: Complete P3-F020 validation and later obtain explicit human selection and access decisions

blocker: Dataset-specific QC thresholds summaries and exclusions are not approved
required_resolution: Audit approved data and obtain named QC approval before feature extraction or training

blocker: No donor-level split manifest or executable leakage assessment exists
required_resolution: Verify complete donor/sample mappings then build and audit a donor-level split manifest

blocker: No populated patient-level feature manifest exists
required_resolution: Create features only after access QC labels and split policy receive approval

blocker: GSE137029 and CELLxGENE/HCA cannot be treated as independent cohorts
required_resolution: Use CELLxGENE/HCA only as a primary candidate and find a separate cohort for external validation

blocker: No independent external-validation cohort is verified or assigned
required_resolution: Audit a distinct cohort with explicit person IDs compatible labels and documented non-overlap

blocker: Training permission modeling readiness and Phase 4 permission remain blocked
required_resolution: Pass every readiness condition and obtain a new explicit human permission decision
